text.title: Performance Testing Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is a signed SLO (p50/p95/p99/RPS/error_rate_ceiling) on file?

conclusion.verdict: halt; author SLO with owner first

branch.question: Is a `.perf/baseline.json` committed at a stable SHA?

conclusion.verdict: halt; run baseline and commit before optimisation

branch.question: Does staging mirror production data volume?

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
